notes: The in-repository Vivi2D compat plugin source is Vivi2D-maintained Apache-2.0 code and may be included in the public OSS source tree.
This record does not approve bundling ComfyUI, ComfyUI-See-through, See-through source, model weights, generated assets, or a combined custom-node pack. Those remain separate release decisions.

seeThrough.thirdPartyNotice: ComfyUI-See-through is a separate MIT-licensed third-party custom-node plugin installed by users from its upstream source; it is not bundled in this source tree.
